originalAlarm.description: Null pointer passed to 1st parameter expecting 'nonnull'

reasoning: bbeb0516cf0.c L6: 'Null pointer passed to 1st parameter expecting nonnull'. r=NULL at L18, passed to cgi_handler(r); when APR_FILES_AS_SOCKETS=T, cgi_handler calls cgi_bucket_create(r=NULL); at L6, strcat(NULL, 'something') is called — strcat's first argument has nonnull attribute, passing NULL is a null pointer violation. PC=APR_FILES_AS_SOCKETS=T correctly constrains the condition for the call path to exist. New bug (no ERROR comment). Correctly constrained PC.
